text.title: mobile-responsive Output Contract
text.summary: Required CSS invariants and Playwright assertions for a responsive UI.

example.note: clamp() spacing, 44px tap target, mobile-first media query.
Four violations: fixed px, desktop-first, undersized tap target, 100vh.

list.item: Viewport meta tag present in head.
Interactive elements have computed min-block-size and min-inline-size >= 44px.
Lighthouse mobile run shows perf >= 85, a11y >= 95.
